_comment: Golden set for eval:verifier. Seeded from REAL submissions that already ran through the Stage-2 verifier (see id). `expected` is the target verdict; `truth: true` marks cases independently verified against the evidence (hard ground truth), `truth: false` marks agreement references (the prior all-Sonnet verdict) where divergence warrants a look, not an automatic fail. Evidence files live in public/uploads/evidence.

goldens.name: Cheers Bar & Grill — menu photo confirms
goldens.diffSummary: New Monday–Friday 3–6pm happy hour with food items
goldens.note: Uploaded menu card explicitly states 'Available Monday to Friday from 3pm to 6pm' with $10/$12 food items. Vision path (image) → confirm.

goldens.name: Blue Line Pizza — closed claim contradicted
goldens.note: Text/web path — the live site shows the venue operating, contradicting a 'closed' claim. Reference verdict from prior Sonnet run.

goldens.name: Ojos Locos — vague Sunday change, PDF, unconfirmed
goldens.note: PDF vision path. Change too vague to pin to the PDF content → null. Reference verdict.

goldens.name: Barro's Pizza — vague photo, unconfirmed
goldens.diffSummary: I think this is their happy hour
goldens.note: Image vision path with an under-specified change → null. Reference verdict.
